title: Item Set (v1)
$comment: An item set groups matching gear pieces that grant stacking additive stat bonuses once enough of them are worn. One file per set under data/item-sets/. Bonuses are computed live from currently-equipped items every stat read and are never persisted, so no Player schema change is involved.

id.description: Unique id of the set, matched against the 'set_id' field of member items.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in EQUIPMENT, SCORE and EXAMINE (e.g. "Wayfarer's Leathers").

pieces.description: Ordered ids of the items that make up the set (2-5 pieces across different equip slots). Every id must resolve to a schema-valid, independently obtainable equippable item.

thresholds.description: One or more '{ pieces_required, stats }' thresholds. Every threshold whose pieces_required is met by the number of worn set pieces contributes its stats additively (thresholds stack).

pieces_required.description: Number of worn set pieces at or above which this threshold's stats apply.

stats.description: Additive stat bonuses (e.g. { "ac": 2 }) granted while this threshold is met, layered on top of each piece's own attributes.stats.
